subject: App Crash Report
body:
Hi team,

Since updating to version 3.1.0 on my Pixel 6 (Android 14), the app crashes when I tap 'Export'. Steps: 1) Open Tasks, 2) Tap Export, 3) Choose PDF, 4) Crash. Please advise.

Thanks,
Jordan

subject: Feature Request: Dark Mode
body:
Hello,

I'd love a dark theme for late-night planning. My eyes would thank you!

Best,
Riley

subject: Data Loss Problem
body: Urgent! I lost my tasks after syncing between my iPad (iOS 17.4) and Mac app. I had just merged two lists when everything vanished. Please recover ASAP.

subject: Suggestion for Improvement
body:
Hi team,

It would be great if the recurring tasks supported custom intervals like every 3 days.

Regards,
Maya

subject: Login Issue
body: Can't log in using Google SSO. Error: OAuth2 timeout. Device: iPhone 13 Pro, iOS 17.3.1. Started after yesterday's release.

subject: Love the app
body: Just wanted to say the app keeps me organized every week. Keep it up!
